input: Mina has 14 apples. She gives 5 apples to her sister and then buys 9 more apples. How many apples does Mina have now?
There were 32 birds on a tree. 11 flew away and then 7 more landed on the tree. How many birds are on the tree now?
A student read 12 pages on Monday, 15 pages on Tuesday, and 9 pages on Wednesday. If the book has 50 pages total, how many pages are left?
